public_reproducible_evidence_mode_requir: packet evidence_source_mode may be public_reproducible only when a public_reproducible_evidence_sources_v1 manifest is included
public sources must be HTTPS URLs with explicit license, version_or_snapshot, retrieved_at, content_sha256, archive_sha256, and derived_artifact_sha256s
public source flags must be publicly_accessible=true, permission_allows_research_evaluation=true, non_synthetic=true, and raw_private_payload=false
public manifest covered_artifact_sha256s must be derived from the listed public sources and cover every expected candidate/canonical artifact hash

public examples do not bypass response preflight, candidate intake, validate-only assembly, governance approval, approved promotion, broad validators, or four-specialist LLM subagent adjudication where required

current_blockers: fair external baseline run packet missing
real Microsoft GraphRAG/LightRAG/HippoRAG package runs are not present
answer-quality adjudication packet is not present
graph-quality validation packet is not present
permission leak probe results are not present
required_answer_quality_adjudication_evi: four-specialist LLM subagent answer-quality adjudication with fixed professional roles
or legacy human answer-quality adjudication retained only for backwards compatibility
adjudication rows for every baseline answer set
custody receipt binding reviewed artifact hashes
required_graph_quality_evidence: graph-quality validation rows for every baseline
required_run_artifact_content_contract: every run artifact binds baseline_id, source_lock_sha256, source_ids, package_source_url, package_version, real_package_execution, mock_or_dry_run, synthetic_corpus, uses_mocked_llm_or_retrieval, and run_manifest_sha256

current_blockers: two independent first-pass human submissions are not present
adjudication-open receipt, final adjudication, confusion matrix, custody receipt, or four-specialist LLM subagent panel are not present
required_adjudication_controls: four-specialist LLM panel uses the fixed professional roles and every specialist independently returns PASS
four-specialist LLM panel binds manifest, work-order, reviewed artifact, rubric, prompt, and output hashes
four-specialist LLM panel must not claim completed human adjudication
legacy human route still requires two independent first-pass reviewer submissions, human adjudicator, adjudication-open receipt, confusion matrix, and custody receipt
required_artifacts: or legacy first_pass_submission_artifacts plus adjudication_artifact plus confusion_matrix_artifact plus custody_receipt_artifact

current_blockers: real enterprise multimodal pilot manifest is not present
enterprise spreadsheet/mail/meeting/video validation packets are not present
multimodal human adjudication and cross-modal permission leak probe are not present
must_not_claim: financial advice or autonomous business judgment
required_controls: FormOwl locator bound to asset id
validation rows bound to source asset hashes
four-specialist LLM subagent adjudication covers every validation row exactly, or legacy human adjudication is supplied
business decision review is reviewed and non-autonomous
permission probe denies revoked grants, private content, raw asset access, and entity-match-as-access

current_blockers: non-synthetic production deployment validation is not present
human or LLM-subagent-reviewed false-merge labels are not present
permission probes, rollback smoke, and production audit artifacts are not present
required_controls: manifest adapter stack digest bound to component artifacts
permission filters enabled on every adapter component
canonical writes disabled on adapter evidence path
four-specialist LLM-subagent-reviewed false-merge labels for RapidFuzz and Splink, or legacy human-reviewed labels retained only for backwards compatibility
one request id, one resource ref, and one policy id across audit rows
revoked grant audit row binds grant_state == revoked
deny guards for private candidates, entity match without grant, raw asset reads, and canonical merge without review
rollback smoke verifies migration rollback, partial-failure rollback, append-only audit, and idempotent retry
no raw/internal values, including driver-qualified database URIs

verification_after_any_real_packet_updat: docker run --rm -v ${PWD}:/workspace -w /workspace/.formowl/kg-eval formowl-dev:local python -m unittest discover -s . -p 'test_*.py'
